description_long: This is a low-poly, modern coupe car with a bold orange and black color scheme, featuring a prominent hood scoop and visible engine components. The car has a sleek, angular body with sharp lines, blacked-out windows, and a rear spoiler for a sporty appearance. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, contributing to its aggressive stance. The rear of the car displays dual exhaust pipes and a wide taillight bar, with the word 'MUSTANGCGBARS' visible on the trunk. The side profile reveals two doors and a fastback roofline, emphasizing its coupe design. The overall look is inspired by American muscle cars, likely referencing a Ford Mustang, with exaggerated, stylized proportions.
description: A stylized orange and black coupe car with a hood scoop, rear spoiler, and aggressive muscle car features. It has two doors, large black wheels, and a fastback roofline.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold hood scoop, angular headlights, and aggressive front fascia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, large wheels, and fastback roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide taillight bar, dual exhausts, rear spoiler, and 'MUSTANGCGBARS' text.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe silhouette, black wheels, and visible engine detail on the hood.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
